items.title: Linear Algebra and Its Applications (Lay, Lay, McDonald)
items.author: David C. Lay, Steven R. Lay, Judi J. McDonald
items.note: Standard undergraduate treatment of vector norms, inner products and distance in R^n.

items.title: NumPy.linalg.norm documentation

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
